languages.text: "А что именно ужасает? Этот страх — трепет перед тем, что сильнее тебя. Стань сильнее — и Архивраг станет орудием".
"And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."
languages.original_text: "А что именно ужасает? Этот страх — трепет перед тем, что сильнее тебя. Стань сильнее — и Архивраг станет орудием".

traits.locale_text: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."
"And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."
"And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."

languages.text: 「そして、君を恐ろすものは何だ？君が感じる恐怖は、君より遥かに強いものに対して感じる畏怖だ。強くなれば、敵は武器になる」
languages.original_text: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."

languages.text: "Seni tam olarak ne dehşete düşürüyor? Hissettiğin korku, senden çok daha güçlü bir şeyin karşısındaki huşudur. Güçlenirsen Şerbaşı, bir silaha dönüşür."
languages.original_text: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."

traits.locale_text: "Seni tam olarak ne dehşete düşürüyor? Hissettiğin korku, senden çok daha güçlü bir şeyin karşısındaki huşudur. Güçlenirsen Şerbaşı, bir silaha dönüşür."

languages.text: “你究竟在惧怕什么？你所感受的恐惧，不过是对远强于你的事物的敬畏。只要你变得更强，混沌大敌也可化为你手中的兵刃。”
languages.original_text: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."

traits.locale_text: “你究竟在惧怕什么？你所感受的恐惧，不过是对远强于你的事物的敬畏。只要你变得更强，混沌大敌也可化为你手中的兵刃。”

languages.text: "Und was genau macht Euch Angst? Die Furcht, die Ihr fühlt, ist Ehrfurcht vor etwas, das weit stärker ist als Ihr. Werdet Ihr stärker, wird der Erzfeind zur Waffe."
languages.original_text: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."

traits.locale_text: "Und was genau macht Euch Angst? Die Furcht, die Ihr fühlt, ist Ehrfurcht vor etwas, das weit stärker ist als Ihr. Werdet Ihr stärker, wird der Erzfeind zur Waffe."

languages.text: « Et qu'est-ce qui vous terrifie, exactement ? La peur qui vous étreint n'est rien de plus qu'un sentiment d'effroi mêlé d'admiration que tout un chacun ressent face à quelque chose de plus fort que soi. Il ne tient qu'à vous de gagner en force pour faire du Grand Ennemi une arme. »
languages.original_text: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."

traits.locale_text: « Et qu'est-ce qui vous terrifie, exactement ? La peur qui vous étreint n'est rien de plus qu'un sentiment d'effroi mêlé d'admiration que tout un chacun ressent face à quelque chose de plus fort que soi. Il ne tient qu'à vous de gagner en force pour faire du Grand Ennemi une arme. »

languages.text: «¿Qué le horroriza? El miedo que siente es el asombro ante algo mucho más fuerte que usted. Hágase más fuerte y el Archienemigo no será más que un arma»,
languages.original_text: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."
